target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible collapse of upper floors and facade; extensive debris field covering ground; structural elements like columns appear intact but non-load-bearing walls and roof sections are destroyed; damage exceeds 45% of visible target area.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible debris field covers ground level; multiple floors show collapsed sections; facade elements are missing; structural integrity compromised; damage exceeds 45% of visible target area.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: The building on the right has its upper floors collapsed, with debris covering the street; the remaining structure shows significant structural failure consistent with 45 to 75 percent damage.

summary: Three buildings assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE, each showing collapsed upper floors, missing facades, and debris fields covering ground levels, with damage exceeding 45% of visible areas. The overall scene depicts a narrow street choked with rubble, collapsed structures, and exposed wiring, indicating widespread destruction across multiple buildings. The functional impact is likely catastrophic, with complete loss of structural integrity and pedestrian/vehicular access in the affected area.
